case_title: WISE, CORNELIUS M. vs. DUCKWORTH, HARVEY et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DUCKWORTH, HARVEY DUCKWORTH, KIMBERLY
